title: Gymnogramma falcata
taxonomy: Gymnogramma falcata is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Gymnogramma. Gymnogramma falcata is a member of the class Polypodiopsida, which is a group of vascular plants that includes ferns and their allies.
